metadata.description: Share, analyze and deliver data — in one trusted space

hero.title: More than data
hero.subtitle:
OneHealth DataSpace goes beyond data sharing.
Analyze, process, and publish your data on the same platform, with full control throughout its lifecycle.
hero.graphTagline: The whole data lifecycle. One platform.
hero.graphControl: You stay in control of your data

bridge.title: A traditional data space stops at sharing
bridge.titleHighlight: OneHealth DataSpace covers the whole journey
bridge.text: Sovereign sharing is only the first step. Here, the same platform also gives you the computing power, the analytics and the publishing services you need to turn shared data into results — without ever leaving the trusted space.
bridge.traditionalLabel: A conventional data space ends here
bridge.oursLabel: We continue providing the services you need

services.title: More than data
services.subtitle: A complete operational lifecycle for data
services.store: Secure management of large volumes of data
services.shareWhat: A service for exchanging datasets between organisations in a sovereign way: each entity decides who accesses its data, for what purposes and under which conditions.
services.shareExample: A hospital shares anonymised clinical data with a veterinary research group to study antibiotic resistance.
services.computeWhat: Access to CESGA supercomputing to run intensive workloads: simulations, AI model training or genomic processing.
services.computeExample: Run advanced simulations of complex molecules to analyse their structure, behaviour and interactions at the atomic and molecular level.
services.analyzeWhat: Big Data and analytics tools to explore the data space and turn it into indicators, visualisations and actionable knowledge.
services.analyzeExample: Estimate the average temperature of large geographic areas through the analysis of large volumes of data.
services.storeWhat: Secure, scalable storage for large data volumes, with access control and traceability throughout the whole lifecycle.
services.storeExample: A university deposits years of historical environmental sensor series for reuse in new projects.
services.deliverWhat: Cloud infrastructure to publish results as services: APIs, dashboards or applications accessible to other participants.
services.deliverExample: Develop an interactive web platform to visualise and query the risk of Portuguese man o' war presence at specific geographic locations.

outro.title: The journey is already underway
outro.text: Health, research and business entities are already building use cases on OneHealth DataSpace.
